description: HSA kernel dispatch activity from hsa-snoop

panels.title: hsa-snoop Status
panels.description: Exporter liveness — green means hsa-snoop is scraping the host.

panels.title: Active AQL Queues
panels.description: Current number of open AQL dispatch queues per GPU.

panels.title: Total Kernel Launches (range)
panels.description: Cumulative kernel launches seen over the selected dashboard time range.

panels.title: Kernel Launch Rate
panels.description: Instantaneous kernel launches per second as reported by the exporter gauge.

panels.title: Last Kernel Launch
panels.description: Timestamp of the most recent kernel launch event, shown as time-ago.

panels.title: Last Kernel Name
panels.description: Most recently dispatched kernel name per GPU. One tile per GPU×kernel_name is intentional — the gauge resets as the active kernel changes.

panels.title: GPU Triggered
panels.description: Latches to 1 on the first kernel dispatch seen per GPU; never resets. Use as a basic activity indicator.

panels.title: Kernel Launch Rate
panels.description: Kernel launches per second from the exporter-maintained rolling gauge, one series per GPU.

panels.title: Kernel Launch Rate (by kernel)
panels.description: Per-kernel launch rate via Prometheus rate(), aggregated across all PIDs for readability.

targets.expr:
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, kernel_name) (rate(hsa_kernel_duration_seconds_sum{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
/ sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, kernel_name) (rate(hsa_kernel_duration_seconds_count{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.title: Average Kernel Duration
panels.description: Rolling average kernel execution time per kernel name, computed as rate(sum)/rate(count).

panels.title: Kernel Duration Percentiles
panels.description: p50 and p99 kernel execution time per kernel name, derived from histogram bucket series.

panels.title: Active AQL Queues
panels.description: Active AQL dispatch queue count over time, stacked by GPU.

panels.title: Barrier Packet Rate (by GPU)
panels.description: AQL barrier packet submission rate summed per GPU, removing per-process noise.

panels.title: Top Kernels by Launch Rate
panels.description: Live-ranked table of kernel names by current launch rate. Use as a dispatch hotspot finder.

panels.title: Packet Errors
panels.description: Rate of missed RegisterQueue races (errors_total) per GPU. Non-zero values indicate queue registration timing issues.

panels.title: SDMA I/O (DMA copy engines — N/A on APU/unified-memory nodes)
SDMA Engine Status
panels.description: Orange means APU or unified-memory node with no dedicated SDMA DMA engine.

panels.title: SDMA Throughput (bytes/s by direction)
panels.description: DMA copy engine throughput in bytes/s, split by direction (h2d / d2h).

panels.title: SDMA Copy Rate (by direction)
panels.description: Number of DMA copy operations per second by direction.

panels.title: Active SDMA Queues
panels.description: Active SDMA engine queue count per GPU over time.

panels.title: SDMA Packet Rate (by opcode)
panels.description: SDMA ring packet submission rate broken down by opcode type.

panels.title: AIS — AMD Infinity Storage P2P Direct IO (requires --ais-snoop)
AIS Status
panels.description: Green means at least one P2P direct-IO path is active on this host (requires --ais-snoop).

panels.title: AIS Total Ops (range)
panels.description: Total AIS RX and TX operation count over the selected range, per GPU and PCIe endpoint.

panels.title: AIS Total Bytes (range)
panels.description: Total AIS RX and TX bytes transferred over the selected range, per GPU and PCIe endpoint.

panels.title: AIS Errors (range)
panels.description: Total AIS errors over the selected range, collapsed to GPU and PCIe device. See AIS Error Rate below for errno breakdown.

panels.title: AIS PCIe Device Info
panels.description: PCIe device discovery table: topology, device type, vendor, and ROCm version per AIS-capable endpoint.

panels.title: AIS Throughput (bytes/s)
panels.description: AIS RX and TX throughput in bytes/s per PCIe device.

panels.title: AIS IOPS
panels.description: AIS RX and TX operation rate (IOPS) per PCIe device.

panels.title: AIS Latency Percentiles
panels.description: p50 and p99 AIS I/O latency in seconds per PCIe device and direction.

panels.title: AIS IO Size Distribution
panels.description: p50 and p99 I/O request size in bytes per PCIe device and direction.

panels.title: AIS Error Rate (by direction, device, errno)
panels.description: AIS error rate in errors/s by PCIe device and errno. Non-zero warrants investigation.

targets.expr: sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_rx_bytes_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_tx_bytes_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_rx_ops_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))
sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (rate(ais_tx_ops_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__rate_interval]))

sum by (gpu_id, gpu_type, pcie_id) (increase(ais_rx_errors_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__range]) + increase(ais_tx_errors_total{host=~"$host", gpu_id=~"$gpu_id", pcie_id=~"$pcie_id"}[$__range]))

panels.title: AIS Per-Device Breakdown
panels.description: Summary table: current RX/TX bytes/s, IOPS, p99 latency, and total errors per GPU and PCIe device.

title: HSA Snoop
